name: Paint Chips
short_description: Paint the ground! Paint your enemies! Paint your enemies ground! The ground is your enemy! Paint it!
detailed_description:
Community


About the Game

Paint Chips is an online 2D multiplayer top-down shooter where you splatter your foes with paint! Unlock character customization options as you play and choose a look that suits your style. You can go solo or group up with your friends and paint it up together!



Features:
  • Up to 8-16 players can battle it out across various unique maps and gametypes.
  • 300+ character customization options to give you a unique look!
  • Earn Chips as you play, spend them on your favorite items in the shop!
  • Complete daily and weekly challenges that award you with extra Chips.
  • Host custom private matches with your friends, or test your skill against some bots!
  • Vote for your favorite map and gametype before a match begins.
  • Fight for the top spot on the weekly leaderboard!
  • 4 PvP Playlists that change how teams are set up:
    • FFA - No teams
    • Team - 4 vs 4 battles
    • Doubles - 2 vs 2 vs 2 vs 2 battles
    • Big Team - 8 vs 8 battles
  • 6 gametypes to change the way each match plays out:
    • Paintmatch - Regular painting and chipping
    • Shockets - Everyone spawns with rocket launchers and shotguns
    • Swipers - Everyone spawns with swords and snipers
    • Sprinkbows - Everyone spawns with sprinklers and paintbows
    • Blasterfight - Everyone spawns with blasters
    • Mystery - Everyone spawns with random weapons
  • Fight multiple waves of monsters and bosses in the Chippingrounds co-op playlist
